programmes.show_description: Chilling British horror. A journalist infiltrating a sinister religious cult suspects that one member's homicidal tendencies have prompted him to murder people to save their souls. (1971)

Crime thriller with Chiwetel Ejiofor. A gang of corrupt cops are blackmailed by the mob into carrying out a heist - but realise they can only do it if they kill a police officer as a diversion. (2016)
